mainEntity.name: How much does voice assistant optimization usually cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Costs vary based on whether you need basic on-page updates or a full content and technical overhaul. A smaller project may focus on schema, FAQs, and speed, while a larger one adds content strategy, local optimization, and ongoing analytics.
acceptedAnswer.description: Pricing depends on scope. Simple voice optimization can be relatively light work, while full optimization with content, schema, and tracking is a larger engagement.
